{{Quote|Try the Corellian slice hounds.|[[Merillion Tarko|Baron Tarko]] to his [[Unidentified Neimoidian aide 1|Neimoidian aide]], hopelessly ordering the latest executioners for [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]]|<ref name="TFU2">''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]''</ref>}}
The '''Corellian slice hound''', also known as the '''razor hound''', was a canine creature form [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]

==Biology and appearance==
The Corellian slice hound took its name from its sharp teeth and its spike-covered body. Slice hounds were predators that generally attacked anything smaller than themselves unless they were hungry. They hunted in small packs using an organized and deadly hunting technique.<ref name="Sony" />

Corellian slice hounds were sometimes domesticated as pets.<ref name="SWG" />

An atypical race of Corellian slice hound with a particular behavior was known among hunters and explorers as the vicious slice hound. Contrary to other slice hounds living on Corellia, these beasts used to make their home near structures and natural landmarks frequented by [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. It was believed that vicious slice hounds appreciated these places because of their success in finding new feeding ground.<ref name="Sony" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Merillion Tarko]] also used the creatures in his [[Tarko-se Arena|gladiator arena]] on [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]] in his attempt to execute [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]].<ref name="TFU2" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], some slice hounds were turned into [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] installation known as [[The Warren (Dantooine)|the Warren]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="SWG:P3">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Publish 3: The Warren}}</ref>

The Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]] [[DS-61-3]] had a stylized image of a Corellian slice hound painted on the inner hatch of his starfighter.<ref name="CCG-Black3">{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Black 3}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Slicehound_SWG.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Slice hounds appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
